title: Dequeue
description: Removes a caller from a named queue and bridges them to the current call. Typically used by an agent or operator call flow to connect with the next waiting caller.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

name.description: The name of the queue to dequeue from.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the dequeued call ends.

timeout.description: Time in seconds to wait for a caller to be available in the queue.

beep.description: If true, play a beep when the calls are connected.

callSid.description: Dequeue a specific call by its call SID, rather than the next caller in line.
